description: Coordinated Gene Activity in Pattern Sets (CoGAPS) implements a Bayesian MCMC matrix factorization algorithm, GAPS, and links it to gene set statistic methods to infer biological process activity. It can be used to perform sparse matrix factorization on any data, and when this data represents biomolecules, to do gene set analysis.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## CoGAPS GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
CoGAPS is a GenePattern module that Coordinated Gene Activity in Pattern Sets (CoGAPS) implements a Bayesian MCMC matrix factorization algorithm, GAPS, and links it to gene set statistic methods to infer biological process activity. It can be used to perform sparse matrix factorization on any data, and when this data represents biomolecules, to do gene set analysis.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: data.file, output.file, num.iterations, transpose.data
- Optional: num.patterns, param.file, github.tag

### 3. Command Line
```
/usr/bin/Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore /usr/local/bin/cogaps/run_cogaps_module.R  --data.file\=<data.file>  --output.file\=<output.file> <param.file> <num.patterns> --transpose.data\=<transpose.data> --num.threads\=<job.cpuCount> <github.tag> --num.iterations\=<num.iterations>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/docker-cogaps\:v0.12

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A csv/tsv/gct/mtx file containing gene expression data

parameters.name: param.file
parameters.description: An rds file containg a CogapsParams object

parameters.name: github.tag
parameters.description: Alternate github tag to use to pull a different version of cogaps to run - for testing and development only.
